Project.title: Documentation Project
Project.description: Groups a set of guide pages for a specific application or product.

frontendUrl.description: Custom URL for the guide frontend (e.g. appsync.web.guide)

backendUrl.description: Custom URL for the guide admin (e.g. appsync.web.admin)

Page.title: User Guide Page
Page.description: A page in the user guide hierarchy containing markdown content.

projectId.description: The ID of the project this page belongs to.

sequence.description: The display order of the page.

parentId.description: The ID of the parent page (null for top-level pages).

description.description: A short summary of the page.

content.description: The markdown content of the page.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last update.

createdBy.description: The UID of the user who created the page.
